titleStmt.title: SII 17.571: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 571. (A.R. No. 527 of 1904.) TIRUNELLIKKĀVAL, MANNARGUDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Āmalakēśvara temple.
The details of date given viz., 4th year, Makara ba. 7••• Hasta, corresponds to 1219 A.D., December 29, Sunday, f.d.t. ·02, ·62.

This inscription seems to record a gift of 500 kāśu for a sandhi lamp in the night to the temple, by Anantan Ki(Kṛi)shṇaṉ alias••• gaināṭṭu-vēḷār, the headman of Kalaiyūr. This amount was lent out for interest at the annual rate of 24 per cent to 3 śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple of god Tirunellikkāvuḍaiya-nāyaṉār in Ārvalakkūṟṟam in Rājēndraśōḻā-vaḷanāḍu. Arayan Tillaipperumān, Arayan Gaṇḍarādittadēvaṉ, and Arayan Uyyavandā[ṉ*] (mentioned as brothers in No. 570) figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattika[ḷ śrīrāja]rājatevaṟku yāṇṭu nālāvatu makara nāyaṟṟu Apara ḻamaiyum
saptamiyum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ Irājentiracoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu Ārvalak kūṟ ṟattu Uṭaiyār tirunellikkāvuṭaiyār kovil kāṇi U
ṭaiya śivabrāmaṇaṉ pārattuvāci civaṉaṉ tirunellikkāvuṭaiyāṉāṉa viracoḻappa ṭṭaṉum (uyya) Uyya vantāṉ tirunel
likkāvuṭaiyāṉāṉa nellipaṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ tampi tirunaṭṭamāṭi paṭṭaṉum Imuvom Ivūril Irukkum kalaiyūr kiḻavaṉ Aṉantaṉ ki
ṣṇaṉāṉa kaināṭṭu veḷārkku nāṅkaḷ canti viḷakku Upaiyat tiṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Iṟṟai nāḷāl nāṅkaḷ Ivaṉ pakkal ko
coḻapa koṇṭa kācu 2 100 5 10 nellippaṭṭaṉum tirunaṭṭamāṭipa ṭṭaṉu
m koṇṭa kācu 2 100 5 10 Āka kācu 5 100 Ikkācu Aiññūṟṟukkum māsattu nūṟṟukku Irukācā
ka vanta kācu policai polivatākavum Intap policaiyāl kācukku Iṉṉāyaṉār koyilil
nāḷ Oṉṟukku Oru tiruviḷakku Iravaic cantiyile Iṭakkaṭavomākavum Inta mutal kā
cukke policaik kācukku cantirātittavaraiyum Inta Oru tiruviḷakkum Iravaiccantiyile
kuṭuttom Imuvom . Ippaṭikku Ivai tiṭṭaicceri Uṭaiyā
n Arayan tillaipperumān Eḻuttu:—ippaṭikku Ivai tiṭṭai
cceri Uṭaiyān Arayan kaṇṭarātitta tevaṉ Eḻuttu:—ippaṭi
kku Ivai tiṭṭaicceri Uṭaiyān Arayan UyyavantāA few letters are lost at the end.
Digital edition of SII 17.571 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
